programme.desc: Benjamin dreams of being a great doctor, but his internship at his father’s ward doesn’t turn out the way he hoped. His experience as a junior doctor, with its overwhelming responsibility and stiff competition, forces him to confront his limits and fears.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Stormskerry Maja
programme.desc: At 17, Maja marries humble fisherman Janne and starts a family on the remote island of Stormskerry, where survival is a constant challenge. Amidst the hardships, Maja awakens to her potential, finding resilience and a love that transcends life and death.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: El Alamein
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Sima's Song
programme.desc: In 1970s Afghanistan, best friends Suraya and Sima are torn apart by political upheaval. Suraya is a wealthy communist and Sima is a traditional singer, and though their paths diverge, their enduring bond proves stronger than ideology.

programme.title: Empty Nets
programme.desc: Amir loves Narges and Narges loves Amir. But their hopes and dreams for a life together collide head on with the web of tradition, corruption, and social hierarchy that continues to rule over the lives of a new generation in Iran.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Forever-Forever
programme.desc: In late 90s Kyiv, rebellious Tonia joins a gang, seeking protection and belonging. Amidst the ruins of the post-soviet city, she finds herself tangled up in a secret love triangle and confronting her abusive past.

programme.title: Sima's Song
programme.desc: In 1970s Afghanistan, best friends Suraya and Sima are torn apart by political upheaval. Suraya is a wealthy communist and Sima is a traditional singer, and though their paths diverge, their enduring bond proves stronger than ideology.

programme.title: The Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: Elise is beautiful, funny, and blind. Theo is a seducer but a loser. They love music. But when they meet in the elevator, it's hate at first sight.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Dutch tycoon Jan dies suddenly in Indonesia, leaving his wife Agathe in shock. Their son and his pregnant wife come from the Netherlands to inherit the family empire and are dismayed to find out that Jan's mistress Siti has a crucial role in his will.

programme.title: Empty Nets
programme.desc: Amir loves Narges and Narges loves Amir. But their hopes and dreams for a life together collide head on with the web of tradition, corruption, and social hierarchy that continues to rule over the lives of a new generation in Iran.

programme.title: Future is a Lonely Place
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his family’s death, Frank stages a crime and turns himself in to infiltrate a prison drug ring. Frank aims to get close to the man responsible for their death, and forms a dangerous bond with a guard along the way.

programme.title: Red Eagle
programme.desc: A Summit between France, England, Portugal and the Pope is to take place in Spain, under the guise of looking for a solution to the conflict between Spain and Portugal; but the ulterior motive is to attack the Kingdom of Spain.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Laras was pressured to express his decision to live without children when his in-laws asked him to adopt a child because he was deemed unable to produce offspring.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: The Voice
programme.desc: To be released from a terrifying voice, Derya must do as it says and follow the one man closest to her, Onur - her boss and childhood friend. Soon enough Derya uncovers some shocking truths about him and is caught up in a dangerous web.

programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. programme.title: Upin & Ipin S10 - EP 4
programme.desc: In the 10th season of Upin & Ipin, include the twins and friends playing a game in a futuristic field, learning about a new celebration, and finding strange creatures in the village.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 8
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 9
programme.desc: Tuan Ishak suffers a heart attack and Azizi is devastated to learn he has cancer. Fatimah and Kak Ila come to blows as they scheme their ways to get the house.

programme.title: Lintas Pintas - EP 3
programme.desc: Contestants compete as a team in each episode by passing through a maze with different doors and try to accumulate as much money as possible by answering a simple multiple choice question at each door. After crossing the 10th door, the team enter their Prize Vault to collect their winning amount. Contestants stand to win up to 10,000 worth of cash and prizes.

programme.title: Gerimis Di Hati Sr 1 - EP 2
programme.desc: As the sole breadwinner with a monthly income of less than 1500, Nizam struggles to care for his wife, Alifah, and two children. Alifah wishes to have her father and handicapped brother stay with her, and Nizam feels immense pressure to earn more money so that the family can upgrade to a bigger apartment. But Nizam was tricked by his sister Nana to take a loan on her behalf and he is forced to sell his current apartment to pay for the loan.

programme.title: Tiada Maaf Buatmu - EP 23
programme.desc: Iqbal asks Tok Wan for forgiveness for concealing the truth about Aina and her family's connection to him. Aina wants Mohsin to take responsibility for Suzy and reminds him to forget about getting back together.

programme.title: Tiada Maaf Buatmu - EP 24
programme.desc: Iqbal wants to right the wrongs and is determined to make Aina his wife. However, things take a turn when he visits her family with Mariam and Burn.

programme.title: Misteri Minda - EP 7
programme.desc: Intermittent Explosive Disorder is a lesser known mental disorder marked by episodes of unwarranted anger. Can the behavioural outbursts be controlled by mere anger management? We will find out in this season finale of Misteri Minda.

programme.title: Hard To Heart S5 - EP 19
programme.desc: A heart-to-heart talk that will uncover stories that have never been shared with the country's celebrities and new host, Awal Ashaari.

programme.title: Kembalikan Pelangiku
programme.desc: Hamidi was imprisoned for a crime and left behind 3 children to his wife. His wife, Maizurah, divorced him and married Zakuan, who abused her. Seven years later, Hamidi is released from prison and unite with his children. Unfortunately, their reunion was cut short by Hamidi's death in an accident. Angah, upset by their mother's suffering, killed Zakuan. Despite Angah’s imprisonment, the family reunited, and Along brought Maizurah home.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S10 - EP 4
programme.desc: In the 10th season of Upin & Ipin, include the twins and friends playing a game in a futuristic field, learning about a new celebration, and finding strange creatures in the village.

programme.title: Indonesia Authentic Places - EP 15
programme.desc: For most of the time, Indonesia is a magnet for most travelers and adventurers. With more than seventeen thousand islands scattered across over five million kilometers and three time zones that needs a lifetime to explore and appreciate its natural beauty. Same with its title, the program sums it all up into twenty-five must-visit authentic destinations that simply cannot be missed. From defining beaches to magical mountains and wild forests, be prepared to be amazed by authentic Indonesia.

programme.title: New Stirrings - EP 2
programme.desc: Episode 2 explores how hawkers reinvent and adapt to modern tastes while balancing growth, change and identity, capturing the evolving flavours of Singapore’s hawker culture.

programme.title: (Live) Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Kyrgyzstan - EP 10
programme.desc: Kyrgyzstan is a country that resembles a hidden paradise and is seldom explored. This Central Asian nation is home to 1,001 extraordinary treasures that remain untouched by modernity. With its snowy mountains, sea-blue lakes, rows of white yurts, and hundreds of tame horses, Kyrgyzstan offers a unique experience for travellers.

programme.title: Ini Baru Rare: Iceland - EP 17
programme.desc: Iceland, a sub-Arctic country, boasts breathtaking landscapes and natural phenomena that are rarely found elsewhere in the world. Recently, it has gained recognition among global travelers, becoming a paradise for photographers, 4WD drivers, and enthusiasts of cold climates.
